issues.title: The interface VectorStore need support custom collectionName config.
issues.body:
When part of the company need to distinguishing business type data, it can't define collection name by myself.
such as create Hotel, retail and food, that there are all different industry as collection name.

Current, it's only use default vector_store collection name with MilvusVectorStore or PgVectorStore(package: org.springframework.ai.vectorstore).
spring ai version: 0.8.0

thanks a lot.

comments.body: You should use the vector store metadata features to associate entity type etc within a given collection.  See https://docs.spring.io/spring-ai/reference/api/vectordbs.html#_metadata_filters for more information.
